label: 格式工厂
description: 对输入的网格与名称清单进行格式校验、拆分与规范化，输出标准单值网格列表和规范名称清单。
description-en: Validates, splits, and normalizes input grids and name lists into standard single-value grid list and canonical name entries.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标，工厂齿轮图案，左侧输入不规则多彩网格，右侧输出整齐01网格列表，主色为深蓝和橙色，简洁现代。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 网格输入
inputs.description: 支持单值网格、多值网格、网格列表及混合嵌套格式
inputs.description-en: Accepts single-value grid, multi-value grid, grid list, or any nested mix.

inputs.name: nameList
inputs.label: 名称清单
inputs.description: 支持任意嵌套格式的名称清单，将被拍平并规范化为标准格式
inputs.description-en: Name list in any nested format; will be flattened and normalized to standard entries.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.label: 运行模式
inputs.description: sort=执行所有步骤（校验+拆分+拍平）；后续可扩展更多模式
inputs.description-en: sort=run all steps (validate + split + flatten); more modes can be added later.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 网格列表
outputs.description: 拆分后的单值01网格列表
outputs.description-en: List of single-value binary (0/1) grids after splitting.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 规范化后的名称清单，格式为 [{id, name, type}]
outputs.description-en: Normalized name list with entries in format {id, name, type}.

outputs.name: detail
outputs.label: 详细信息
outputs.description: 各步骤的校验与处理结果说明
outputs.description-en: Detailed report of each step's validation and processing result.
